title: androrchis laeta
intro: Androrchis laeta, also known as the 'Bleeding Heart Orchid', is a rare and exotic orchid species native to the Himalayan region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which have been used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The roots of the Androrchis laeta plant contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, and supporting immune function. Androrchis laeta is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, with the roots being dried and then steeped in hot water to release their medicinal properties.
